task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Porsche 911 (Vehicle). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $132300.00 and wholesale is $86040.00. Product features: Iconic sports car with rear-mounted flat-six engine and exceptional performance. Reference: https://www.porsche.com/usa/models/911/

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Porsche 911. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Porsche 911. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
